---
title: "Jenique Blanc"
subtitle: "Data Scientist"
# `profile.jpg` photo by Jan Tinneberg on https://unsplash.com
image: profile picture .PNG
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/jenique-blanc
---

I’m a senior at the University of South Florida studying Econometrics and Finance, with a strong interest in investment analysis and risk management. I enjoy using data to solve real-world problems and am working toward a career in the financial industry.

## Education

University of South Florida, City\ Tampa| Location \ Florida| Aug 2022 - May 2026

## Experience

Workplace \ Marshall Student Center | Job title \ Building Manager| Jan 2024 - present
